target: 6. Drawing Close
…It's quiet, isn't it?
Still no call from Tokiko?
Ah, no response yet.
I see.

Just a little while until the ferry departs.
We should rest quietly until then.
Yeah…

Hey, Shin-chan.
What do you do for fun in Tokyo?
Huh?

I guess it's different from the countryside?
Like going to a stylish cafe after school.
You… why ask me that now?
I just happened to wonder.

There's still time until the ferry,
so it's better to stay quiet.

If a shadow is nearby,
they might find out where we are.
Yeah… I get it.

But… if I just stay quiet,
I end up thinking weird things.

It feels like my mind's being crushed
by things I don't want to think about.

Sorry, I overstepped.
I should've considered your feelings…
It's natural to be worried.

Well, talk as much as you want.
As long as you don't shout, it's fine.

Yeah.
So, what should we talk about?
Yeah… Let's start with that.
Mio, you really are interested in Tokyo?
Huh?

I'm sorry, but I don't think I can give you
the kind of story you're expecting.
I don't even know stylish cafes.
What I wanted to know wasn't that…
Then what?
Um…

There's something I've wanted to ask you
for a long time.
Ah, go ahead.
Shin-chan… Did you get a girlfriend in Tokyo?
W-what kind of random question is that!?
You don't need to be so surprised…

Ah, sorry… I just wasn't expecting
something so random all of a sudden.

So, what's the answer?
Do you have a beautiful girlfriend in Tokyo?

Do I look like I have a girlfriend?
I could never have one.

That's not true.
If you wanted to, you'd definitely be popular.
You're overestimating me…

But if that's the case, Shin-chan,
you could come back here after school.

You wouldn't leave me behind
and make me cry, would you?
What… are you talking about?

If you came back here and took over the business,
that'd be great.
Eh…?
Then I'd help you all the time.

Of course, if you get a good job in Tokyo,
you should go there first.
But… I'd be happy if you ever came back.
I see…

S-so, Shin-chan, it's been a while
since you entered the gym, right?
How's it?

What do you mean "how's it"?
I don't think it's changed much.
Ah… I remember.

Mio, do you remember?
There was a girl named Kaori Koyuba
who was our classmate with me and Ushio.

I think she transferred to Tokyo
when I was in fifth grade.

Hmm…
I kind of remember her.
She was a quiet girl, right?

Yes, that's her.
Her full name is Kaori Koyuba…

Kaori Koyuba!?
Could it be… Kaori-chan!?
Shhh, your voice is too loud.

Sorry!
But, really?
Is it really that idol, Kaori-chan?

Seems like it.
That's a surprising fact, isn't it?
Yeah, it's really surprising.

Tokyo's a crazy place, huh?
When we were on the island, she seemed so quiet.

No, just moving to Tokyo
doesn't mean she became an idol.
She worked hard for it.

W-what's going on?
You're defending her so much,
maybe…
What?
Oh! I knew it!

You came back to the city
with her, the idol girlfriend!

W-what are you talking about!?
I only met her yesterday!

Ah… I did it.
My voice was pretty loud just now.
Hehe, yeah.

…I wonder if Kaori-chan
got away okay?

It's really pitiful.
She came all the way here
and ended up in this mess…

It'll be fine.
I'm sure it will.
Yeah…

Still, an idol… 
It's strange to think someone from our generation
became a celebrity.

If my older sister had gone to Tokyo too,
she might have become one too.
Huh… Ushio?

You think so too, right?
After all, my older sister was so pretty.
I don't know… But even if Ushio became an idol,

she'd probably get fired
by some annoying high-up.

Haha, that's true.
I can already picture it.
Right?

Haha… It feels like it's been a while
since we talked like this.
It's really nostalgic.

I wish we could talk about
random stuff like this more often.

Older sister,
why isn't she here?
Why… why is it just us?
Ah… I don't know.

Ah, no no no!
I'm getting weak so easily!

If it were my older sister, she'd never
get weak like this.
She'd definitely push forward.

For a while, I'll try to act
by thinking, "What would my older sister do?"

If it were Ushio, she'd do it.
She definitely would keep moving forward.

No matter what monster she faced,
she'd probably kick it.
But, jumping kicks might be too much.
You don't need to copy that.

Anyway, just a little longer.
We'll definitely get off this island.
Yeah!
――What!?

What's going on!?
It suddenly got dark…
…Is it a power outage?
